notes: Backpropagation is recomputed inside the guest for the selected action row; target network is not updated.

private_witness.intermediates: checked hints for forward activations, gradients, and SGD deltas
private_witness.merkle_path: Merkle path authenticating the transition leaf hash to dataset_root
private_witness.provenance: dataset provenance hashes mirrored from public inputs

public_inputs: dataset provenance, replay leaf, checkpoint hashes, training config, claimed TD/loss/gradient/update values
